items.title: GHSA-c96f-x56v-gq3h: find-my-way: DDoS with HTTP2
items.summary: ### Impact Remotely triggerable DoS in find-my-way when it is used with Node's HTTP/2 server. The short version is that `lookup()` passes `req.method` into `find()`, and `find()` indexes `this.trees[method]`. Since `this.trees` is a normal object, HTTP/2 method values like constructor, `toString`, or `__proto__` can r...
